titles.title: I Am, Redeemed Bought with a Price

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am redeemed, bought with a price, Jesus has changed my whole life. If anybody asks you, just who I am, tell them I am redeemed.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Where there was hate, love now abides, where there was confusion, peace now reigns. I'm a child, child of the King, it's all because I am redeemed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'll tell of His favor, I'll tell of His love, I'll tell of His goodness to me. He purchased my redemption with His own precious blood, and from sin I've been set free.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's no shackles on me, I'm as free as I can be; because Jesus changed my life. He died up on the cross, that's why I can tell the world that I am redeemed.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If you run across anybody that used to know me, tell them I'm doing fine. The last time that you saw me, I was lifting up holy hands, I'll tell them I've been redeemed.
